name: awslabs/cli-agent-orchestrator
summary: Hierarchical tmux-based multi-agent orchestrator that coordinates supervisor and worker sessions across agent CLIs, with dedicated Codex support in a broader cross-CLI system.
evidence: Implements supervisor and worker orchestration patterns with isolated tmux sessions and MCP coordination.
Includes dedicated Codex provider documentation, but the repository is broader than Codex-first workflow curation.
